news.title:
Indraprastha Gas Ltd executed NSE block trade of 4,527,421 shares.
The trade was valued at Rs 71.4 crore, priced at Rs 157.8 per share.
news.summary:

news.title:
Indraprastha Gas Ltd expects minimal impact on PNG, CNG prices despite higher gas costs from the West Asia crisis.
IGL targets 30,000 new PNG connections daily by June, with expanded infrastructure supporting faster growth.
news.summary:
Indraprastha Gas Ltd expects minimal impact on PNG, CNG prices despite higher gas costs from the West Asia crisis.
IGL targets 30,000 new PNG connections daily by June, with expanded infrastructure supporting faster growth.

news.title:
IGL's KK Chatiwal states no steep rise in PNG, CNG prices expected.
Statement made during an interaction with CNBC TV18.
news.summary:
IGL's KK Chatiwal states no steep rise in PNG, CNG prices expected.
Statement made during an interaction with CNBC TV18.

news.title:
PNGRB mandates CGDs, including IGL, to add 30,000 PNG connections by June.
IGL foresees stable PNG/CNG prices and recommends switching gas taxes to specific rates.
news.summary:
PNGRB mandates CGDs, including IGL, to add 30,000 PNG connections by June.
IGL foresees stable PNG/CNG prices and recommends switching gas taxes to specific rates.

news.title:
Haryana govt directs municipalities to clear gas pipeline applications swiftly.
Pending applications to get deemed approval; new requests processed in 24 hours.
news.summary:
Haryana govt directs municipalities to clear gas pipeline applications swiftly.
Pending applications to get deemed approval; new requests processed in 24 hours.

news.title:

Support breakdown, increased selling volume, and bearish momentum observed.

news.title:
Indraprastha Gas Ltd announces senior management changes effective April 1, 2026.
Seven executives, including Bhudev Singh and Manoj Kumar Gupta, appointed to key HOD roles.
news.summary:
Indraprastha Gas Ltd announces senior management changes effective April 1, 2026.
Seven executives, including Bhudev Singh and Manoj Kumar Gupta, appointed to key HOD roles.

news.title:
MGL and IGL shares surged up to 6% on March 25 amid new PNG framework rollout.
The framework eases pipeline deployment, mandates swift PNG connections, and sets timelines for approvals.
news.summary:
MGL and IGL shares surged up to 6% on March 25 amid new PNG framework rollout.
The framework eases pipeline deployment, mandates swift PNG connections, and sets timelines for approvals.

news.title:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.
news.summary:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.

news.title:
Indraprastha Gas Ltd hits 52-week low of Rs 150.05 on 23 Mar 2026.
Stock sees 24.1% annual decline despite some operational strengths.
news.summary:
Indraprastha Gas Ltd hits 52-week low of Rs 150.05 on 23 Mar 2026.
Stock sees 24.1% annual decline despite some operational strengths.

news.title:
Indraprastha Gas Ltd caps PNG supply for hospitals at 80%, effective March 11, per advisory from GAIL Gas.
Hospitals like GTB and Sir Ganga Ram prepare for alternatives, prioritizing essential services and conserving gas usage.
news.summary:
Indraprastha Gas Ltd caps PNG supply for hospitals at 80%, effective March 11, per advisory from GAIL Gas.
Hospitals like GTB and Sir Ganga Ram prepare for alternatives, prioritizing essential services and conserving gas usage.

news.title:
Indraprastha Gas Ltd assures uninterrupted PNG, CNG supply despite Middle East conflict.
Global energy market volatility won't affect IGL's household and vehicle gas supply.
news.summary:
Indraprastha Gas Ltd assures uninterrupted PNG, CNG supply despite Middle East conflict.
Global energy market volatility won't affect IGL's household and vehicle gas supply.

news.title:
Gas distribution stocks like GAIL, Petronet LNG, Indraprastha Gas surged as Trump hinted Iran conflict could end soon.
Sensex rose 621 points, Nifty gained 222 points; energy stocks rallied amid hopes of eased geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Gas distribution stocks like GAIL, Petronet LNG, Indraprastha Gas surged as Trump hinted Iran conflict could end soon.
Sensex rose 621 points, Nifty gained 222 points; energy stocks rallied amid hopes of eased geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
Shares of IGL and MGL dropped 7% and 10%, driven by US-Israel conflict impacting natural gas and crude prices.
Nomura warns IGL and MGL face Ebitda drops if LNG costs rise; Gujarat Gas issued force majeure notices to industrial clients.
news.summary:
Shares of IGL and MGL dropped 7% and 10%, driven by US-Israel conflict impacting natural gas and crude prices.
Nomura warns IGL and MGL face Ebitda drops if LNG costs rise; Gujarat Gas issued force majeure notices to industrial clients.

news.title:
Indraprastha Gas fell 5.6%, closing at 157.45, continuing its downward trend.
The decline reflects company-specific challenges and broader sector pressures.
news.summary:
Indraprastha Gas fell 5.6%, closing at 157.45, continuing its downward trend.

news.title:
City gas firms like Adani Total Gas, Indraprastha Gas, and Gujarat Gas are expanding into smaller cities for growth.
Adani focuses on infrastructure expansion; Indraprastha and Gujarat Gas emphasize steady returns in growing areas.
news.summary:

Indraprastha Gas declares an interim dividend of ₹3.25/share.
This signals strong financial health and shareholder returns.

news.title:
Indraprastha Gas Q3 net profit falls 3.8% to ₹358 crore; revenue rises 1.1% to ₹4,067 crore.
EBITDA grows 6.7% to ₹472.5 crore, with margin improving to 11.6% from 11%.
news.summary:
Indraprastha Gas Q3 net profit falls 3.8% to ₹358 crore; revenue rises 1.1% to ₹4,067 crore.
EBITDA grows 6.7% to ₹472.5 crore, with margin improving to 11.6% from 11%.
